modal/subtitle: A new top-level View with focus, navigation, click and close support.
modal/confirm_hint: Log a click and keep current focus.
modal/go_default_hint: Request default focus for this layer.
modal/go_last_hint: Return to the last focused button in this layer.
modal/close_hint: Close this View and return to the main page.
page/subtitle: 1280 x 720 fixed layout, hierarchy, focus navigation and click-to-open view.
page/hint: Arrow / Tab navigation, Enter/A activate, mouse/touch click.
nav/tip: Click buttons or use arrow keys to switch focus.
nav/home_hint: Default focus target on the main page.
nav/open_modal_hint: Click to create a new top-level View.
focus/tip: Demonstrates default focus, last focus, and debug wireframes.
focus/go_default_hint: Request default focus on the main page.
focus/go_last_hint: Request last focus on the main page.
focus/clear_hint: Clear current focus on the main page.
focus/trail_hint: Keep old-layer focus highlights when pushing a new layer.
tree/subtitle: Current top-level View and subtree structure.
action/subtitle: Demonstrates same-layer navigation, manual cross-layer navigation and click feedback.
action/overview_hint: Update status and log a click.
action/metrics_hint: Display page tree and focus information.
action/open_modal_hint: Content area can also open new Views.
action/restore_focus_hint: Request the last remembered focus on the main page.
app/subtitle: Avatar uses PNG resource, showcase uses SVG with rotation/scale transform.
font/desc: A unified font interface displaying multilingual text and Material Icons fallback chain.
font/zh_cn: Simplified Chinese: Font chain and image resource display
font/zh_tw: Traditional Chinese: System font and fallback test
status_panel/tip: Press I to trigger text input, Enter/A to confirm, Esc/B to cancel.
